name: Mulled Cider
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large kettle.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Strain the liquid to remove cinnamon sticks and any twigs or debris.
5. Serve hot. Optionally, add half a (fresh) cinnamon stick to each cup.
